prompt.task: Break feature PRD into implementable stories with dependency analysis and Claude Code context requirements

context.methodology: AAFD v2.0 - Solo developer with AI assistant
context.session_management: Context preservation across multiple development sessions
context.project_patterns: SlideHeroes uses MakerKit patterns with Turborepo, Next.js 15, and Supabase

step.title: Analyze PRD Structure
step.description: Identify logical implementation units and cross-cutting functionality. Reference existing SlideHeroes patterns for similar features (AI tools, content management, user interfaces).

step.title: Create User Stories
step.description: Break PRD into 2-4 implementable user stories. Each story should be completable in 1-3 development sessions (4-12 hours total effort).

step.title: Define Technical Tasks
step.description: For each story, create 3-7 atomic technical tasks. Include specific file paths, functions, and test requirements. Reference SlideHeroes file structure and patterns.

step.title: Estimate Effort
step.description: Assign story points (1,2,3,5,8,13) based on complexity, unknowns, and dependencies. Use SlideHeroes historical data for calibration.

step.title: Plan Context Requirements
step.description: Identify files, documentation, and context needed for Claude Code to implement each story effectively. Include role assignments and similar pattern references.

story.title: {STORY_TITLE}
story.description: As a {USER}, I want {GOAL} so that {BENEFIT}

input.prd_content: AI Slide Title Suggestions feature PRD
input.current_codebase: SlideHeroes editor components, AI integration patterns
input.similar_features: AI outline generation, AI canvas tools

story.title: Generate AI Title Suggestions
story.description: As a SlideHeroes user, I want to generate AI title suggestions for my slides so that I can create more compelling titles

acceptance_criteria.criterion: User can access title suggestions from slide editor
AI generates 3-5 title options within 5 seconds
Suggestions are contextually relevant to slide content

context_requirements.documentation: Portkey AI Gateway integration, SlideHeroes editor architecture
context_requirements.similar_patterns: AI outline generation, canvas AI tools

concern.implementation_notes: Extend existing ai_usage table and tracking patterns

phase.rationale: Core functionality provides foundation for additional features
